flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 28% at SUNY College at Potsdam vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.0k vs 2.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at SUNY College at Potsdam fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3k → 1.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY College at Potsdam rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.4k → $6.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SUNY College at Potsdam fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).
